step_rationale: Vascular endothelial homeostasis regulator; circulating biomarker for endothelial dysfunction and CAD/MI stratification.
mechanism: miR-126-3p regulates vascular endothelial tight junctions and angiogenic signaling, serving as a circulating biomarker for endothelial activation and CAD/MI risk.

references.title: Alteration of circulating miRNAs during myocardial infarction and association with lipid levels.
Atherosclerotic Conditions Promote the Packaging of Functional MicroRNA-92a-3p Into Endothelial Microvesicles.
